title: MD
biography: Clemens von Pirquet was an Austrian physician who coined the term 'allergy' and developed the tuberculin skin test. He made fundamental contributions to understanding immune responses.
aiSummary: Clemens von Pirquet is a pediatrics specialist at University of Vienna. Based in Vienna.

timeline.title: Coined the term 'allergy'
timeline.description: Introduced the concept and term 'allergy' for altered immune reactivity

timeline.title: Developed tuberculin skin test
timeline.description: Created the diagnostic test for tuberculosis exposure still used today
